text:
EXPLANATION: The Open LLM Leaderboard is a well-known, legitimate project hosted by Hugging Face; the cited authors are individuals who work at Hugging Face and contribute to this project, making the citation an accurate description of the resource despite the official organizational attribution.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/spaces/open-llm-leaderboard/open_llm_leaderboard
FOUND_TITLE: Open LLM Leaderboard
FOUND_AUTHORS: Clémentine Fourrier, Nathan Habib, Alina Lozovskaya, Konrad Szafer, Thomas Wolf
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
